text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for making you waste your time treating
my injury...
choice_data_list: Don't worry about that. How's the pain?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm fine. It's nothing to look so worried over.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm barely even hurt. It's minor enough for me to
be able to treat myself...
choice_data_list: I still want to help with whatever I can.
This is all part of a trainer's job.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm barely even hurt. It's minor enough for me to
be able to treat myself...
choice_data_list: I still want to help with whatever I can.
This is all part of a trainer's job.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, I can't turn down such an adorable offer
like that.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But really, please don't worry about me. I'll be
better in no time.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: It hurts me more to see you upset.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I suppose I'm the cause of it... So I'm
sorry for making you worry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I cheer up the demoralized Super Creek so that
she rests peacefully.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I understand. Then I'm in your care.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I really do love the cool and dependable
side of you too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Who's a good trainer?! Yes, you are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek forces a smile, but she still seems
down. She pats my head as I take care of her.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, deary me. What a surprise!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You're usually so cute, but now you've got this
serious look of maturity on your face...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: My heart... It won't stop pounding!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure to train with everything I've got
once I'm all better.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Super Creek smiles with joy as I tend to her injury.
